name: demo-claude-code-obsidian
description: An example project to explore working with Claude Code and Obsidian
author: Rob Brennan <rob@sploosh.ai>

scripts.telemetry:launch:personal-kb: source .env && cd example-vaults/personal-kb && ollama launch claude --model qwen3.5:9b
scripts.telemetry:launch:project-tracker: source .env && cd example-vaults/project-tracker && ollama launch claude --model qwen3.5:9b
